div.class: alert alert-info d-flex align-items-start gap-2 py-2 mb-2
div.span:
Balls per Unit — how many balls 1 hall unit equals. E.g. Cutting: 1 panel = 1/32 ball → enter 0.0313; Stitching: 1 piece = 1 ball → enter 1. Ball totals are computed automatically from the hall units supervisors log.
Blocked by — the upstream operation(s) that must finish before this step can start. Select the Hall that feeds work into this one. Leave blank if this operation runs independently.
Note: Add all operations first and save the BOM, then set Blocked By — newly added rows are not visible in the dropdown until saved.

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-light border px-2 py-0
button.title: Show operations guide
